_comment: Factory orchestrator policy (spine AD-7). backend: interactive (default — emits the Workflow launch line for the controlling Claude Code session and watches checkpoints) | claude-headless (spawns the claude CLI in print mode; seam is smoke-tested, burn-in pending — see spine Deferred) | dry (plan only, launches nothing). autoApply stays false by design: applying CLOSED worktrees needs 3-way-merge judgment and the human authors every commit (KI-E1).

claudeHeadless.promptTemplate: Operate as the AI-factory worker plane. Launch the Workflow tool on the script at {runScript} with NO args, wait for it to complete, then reply DONE. Do not run any git commands. Do not edit any file outside the per-item worktrees the script names.
